nasb.text: “Gather yourselves and come; Draw near together, you fugitives of the nations; They have no knowledge, Who carry about their wooden idol And pray to a god who cannot save.

esv.text: “Assemble yourselves and come; draw near together, you survivors of the nations! They have no knowledge who carry about their wooden idols, and keep on praying to a god that cannot save.

cnv.text: “列國逃脫的人哪！你們要來集合， 一同近前來。 那些抬著木頭做的偶像， 向不能拯救人的神祈求的， 真是無知。

ccb.text: “列国的流亡者啊， 你们要聚集到这里来。 那些抬着木头神像、 向不能救人的神明祷告的人真愚昧！

csbs.text: “从列国逃脱的人哪， 聚集而来，一同近前吧—— 他们抬着木头雕刻的偶像， 向不能拯救人的神祷告， 真是无知
